title: Fx_Spring Property
description: This sets or returns the value of the virtual coefficient of elasticity for force control in the specified axis for the force in the direction of translation.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
 Fy_Spring, Fz_Spring Property

Fx_Mass, Fy_Mass, Fz_Mass Property
examples:
FSet FCS1.Orientation, FG_TOOL
FSet FC1.CoordinateSystem, FCS1
FSet FC1.Enabled, True, False, False, False, False, False
FSet FC1.Fx_Spring, 0.01
FSet FC1.Fx_Damper, 4
FSet FC1.Fx_Mass, 5
Move CurPos +X(10) FC1
